description: Perform enhanced I Ching divination using the traditional three-coin method; optionally input a query. Returns full hexagram info including changing lines.

returns.description: Contains the obtained hexagram and changing hexagram, line details, explanations, hexagram symbolism, and guidance.

description: Perform enhanced I Ching bibliomancy (consultation by book); input a specific query, returns the related hexagram and explanations with traditional elements.

returns.description: Includes a randomly selected hexagram, Chinese name, Unicode symbol, explanations, divinatory messages, and traditional guidance.

description: Query detailed information for a specific I Ching hexagram by number, including Chinese name, Unicode symbol, and comprehensive commentary.

returns.description: Returns detailed hexagram info, including name, symbol, judgment text, line text, and traditional interpretation.
Provides status and metrics about current server operation and load.
